tools.name: device_info
tools.description: Return board identity, firmware version, and capability flags.

tools.name: sensor_read
tools.description: Read the current value from a supported sensor module.

tools.name: display_text
tools.description: Render a short text payload on a supported display module.

tools.name: servo_move
tools.description: Move a supported servo output to the requested angle.

tools.name: serial_log_read
tools.description: Read recent serial log output from the connected device.
